docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,209.49 FILED BY SARDESON, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT DOWTY, BOBBI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE TODAY IN OPEN COURT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTRED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SARDESON, JASON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOWTY, BOBBI JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. THE LANDLORD'S OFFER TO TERMINATE THE LEASE EARLY AFTER DEFENDANT'S DEPARTURE MITIGATED ALL DAMAGES CLAIMED BY THE PLAINTIFF AGAINST THE DEFENDANT WHICH AROSE FROM PLAINTIFF'S DECISION TO CONTINUE RENTING THE PREMISES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
